textAr: الٓر ۚ تِلْكَ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَقُرْءَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
textEn: Alif Lām Ra. These are the verses of the Book and a clear Qur’an.
textTranslit: Alif-Laaam-Raa; tilka Aayaatul Kitaabi wa Qur-aa-nim Mubeen

textAr: رُّبَمَا يَوَدُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ مُسْلِمِينَ
textEn: The disbelievers will soon wish that they were Muslims.
textTranslit: Rubamaa yawaddul lazeena kafaroo law kaanoo muslimeen

textAr: ذَرْهُمْ يَأْكُلُوا۟ وَيَتَمَتَّعُوا۟ وَيُلْهِهِمُ ٱلْأَمَلُ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
textEn: Let them eat and enjoy themselves and be diverted with false hope; they will come to know.
textTranslit: Zarhum yaakuloo wa tatamatta'oo wa yulhihimul amalu fasawfa ya'lamoon

textAr: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا وَلَهَا كِتَابٌ مَّعْلُومٌ
textEn: We never destroyed any town except that it had a destined time.
textTranslit: Wa maaa ahlaknaa min qaryatin illaa wa lahaa kitaabum ma'loom

textAr: مَّا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
textEn: No nation can advance its appointed time, nor can they delay it.
textTranslit: Maa tasbiqu min ummatin ajalahaa wa maa yastaakhiroon

textAr: وَقَالُوا۟ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِى نُزِّلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلذِّكْرُ إِنَّكَ لَمَجْنُونٌ
textEn: They say, “O you to whom the Reminder has been sent down, You are surely insane!
textTranslit: Wa qaaloo yaaa aiyuhal lazee nuzzila 'alaihiz Zikru innaka lamajnoon

textAr: لَّوْ مَا تَأْتِينَا بِٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
textEn: Why do you not bring us the angels, if you are truthful?”
textTranslit: Law maa taateenaa bil malaaa'ikati in kunta minas saadiqeen

textAr: مَا نُنَزِّلُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓا۟ إِذًا مُّنظَرِينَ
textEn: We do not send down the angels except for a just cause, and then [the disbelievers] would be granted no respite.
textTranslit: Maa nunazzilul malaaa'i kata illaa bilhaqqi wa maa kaanooo izam munzareen

textAr: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا ٱلذِّكْرَ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ لَحَـٰفِظُونَ
textEn: It is We Who have sent down the Reminder, and it is We Who will preserve it.
textTranslit: Innaa Nahnu nazalnaz Zikra wa Innaa lahoo lahaa fizoon

textAr: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ فِى شِيَعِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
textEn: We did send messengers before you among the factions of early peoples.
textTranslit: Wa laqad arsalnaa min qablika fee shiya'il awwaleen

textAr: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
textEn: No messenger came to them except that they ridiculed him.
textTranslit: Wa maa yaateehim mir Rasoolin illaa kaanoo bihee yastahzi'oon

textAr: كَذَٰلِكَ نَسْلُكُهُۥ فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
textEn: This is how We let this [denial] enter the hearts of the wicked.
textTranslit: kazaalika naslukuhoo fee quloobil mujrimeen

textAr: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ ۖ وَقَدْ خَلَتْ سُنَّةُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
textEn: They will not believe in it, although the examples of the earlier people are well established.
textTranslit: Laa yu'minoona bihee wa qad khalat sunnatul awwaleen

textAr: وَلَوْ فَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَابًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَظَلُّوا۟ فِيهِ يَعْرُجُونَ
textEn: Even if We were to open for them a gateway to the heaven, through which they kept ascending,
textTranslit: Wa law fatahnaa 'alaihim baabam minas samaaa'i fazaloo feehi ya'rujoon

textAr: لَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا سُكِّرَتْ أَبْصَـٰرُنَا بَلْ نَحْنُ قَوْمٌ مَّسْحُورُونَ
textEn: they would still say, “Our eyes have been dazzled; rather, we have been bewitched.”
textTranslit: Laqaaloo innamaa sukkirat absaarunaa bal nahnu qawmum mashooroon

textAr: وَلَقَدْ جَعَلْنَا فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ بُرُوجًا وَزَيَّنَّـٰهَا لِلنَّـٰظِرِينَ
textEn: We have placed constellations in the heaven and adorned it for the onlookers,
textTranslit: Wa laqad ja'alnaa fissamaaa'i buroojanw wa zaiyannaahaa linnaazireen

textAr: وَحَفِظْنَـٰهَا مِن كُلِّ شَيْطَـٰنٍ رَّجِيمٍ
textEn: and We have guarded it from every accursed devil,
textTranslit: Wa hafiznaahaa min kulli Shaitaanir rajeem

textAr: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱسْتَرَقَ ٱلسَّمْعَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌ مُّبِينٌ
textEn: except the one who manages to eavesdrop, he will then be pursued by a visible burning flame.
textTranslit: Illaa manis taraqas sam'a fa atba'ahoo shihaabum mubeen

textAr: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَـٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ مَّوْزُونٍ
textEn: As for the earth, We have spread it out and placed therein firm mountains, and caused to grow therein everything in due proportion.
textTranslit: Wal arda madadnaahaa wa alqainaa feehaa rawaasiya wa ambatnaa feehaa min kulli shai'im mawzoon

textAr: وَجَعَلْنَا لَكُمْ فِيهَا مَعَـٰيِشَ وَمَن لَّسْتُمْ لَهُۥ بِرَٰزِقِينَ
textEn: And We have made therein for you means of sustenance and for those whom you do not provide.
textTranslit: Wa ja'alnaa lakum feehaa ma'aayisha wa mal lastum lahoo biraaziqeen

textAr: وَإِن مِّن شَىْءٍ إِلَّا عِندَنَا خَزَآئِنُهُۥ وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
textEn: There is nothing except that We have its treasuries, and We do not send it down except in a determined measure.
textTranslit: Wa im min shai'in illaa 'indanaa khazaaa 'inuhoo wa maa nunazziluhooo illaa biqadarim ma'loom

textAr: وَأَرْسَلْنَا ٱلرِّيَـٰحَ لَوَٰقِحَ فَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَسْقَيْنَـٰكُمُوهُ وَمَآ أَنتُمْ لَهُۥ بِخَـٰزِنِينَ
textEn: And We send fertilizing winds, and send down rain from the sky for you to drink, and it is not you who could store it.
textTranslit: Wa arsalnar riyaaha la waaqiha fa anzalnaa minas samaaa'i maaa'an fa asqai naakumoohu wa maaa antum lahoo bikhaazineen

textAr: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَنَحْنُ ٱلْوَٰرِثُونَ
textEn: Indeed, it is We Who give life and cause death, and We are the Inheritors [of all things].
textTranslit: Wa innnaa la nahnu nuhyee wa numeetu wa nahnul waarisoon

textAr: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا ٱلْمُسْتَقْدِمِينَ مِنكُمْ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا ٱلْمُسْتَـْٔخِرِينَ
textEn: We surely know those of you who have gone before and those who are yet to come.
textTranslit: Wa la qad 'alimnal mustaqdimeena minkum wa laqad 'alimnal mustaakhireen

textAr: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحْشُرُهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ حَكِيمٌ عَلِيمٌ
textEn: It is your Lord Who will gather them together. He is All-Wise, All-Knowing.
textTranslit: Wa inna Rabbaka Huwa yahshuruhum; innahoo Hakeem 'Aleem

textAr: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن صَلْصَـٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
textEn: We have created man from sounding clay, made of aging mud.
textTranslit: Wa laqad khalaqnal insaana min salsaalim min hama im masnoon

textAr: وَٱلْجَآنَّ خَلَقْنَـٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ مِن نَّارِ ٱلسَّمُومِ
textEn: And the jinn We created before that, from smokeless fire.
textTranslit: Waljaaanna khalaqnaahu min qablu min naaris samoom

textAr: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خَـٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًا مِّن صَلْصَـٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
textEn: And [remember] when your Lord said to the angels, “I am going to create a human being from sounding clay, made of aging mud.
textTranslit: Wa iz qaala Rabbuka lilmalaaa' ikati innee khaaliqum basharam min salsaalim min hama im masnoon

textAr: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سَـٰجِدِينَ
textEn: When I have shaped him and breathed into him of My spirit, then fall down before him in prostration.”
textTranslit: Fa izaa sawwaituhoo wa nafakhtu feehi mir roohee faqa'oo lahoo saajideen

textAr: فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
textEn: Thereupon, all of the angels fell down in prostration,
textTranslit: Fasajadal malaaa'ikatu kulluhum ajma'oon

textAr: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
textEn: except for Iblīs, who refused to be with those who prostrated.
textTranslit: Illaaa ibleesa abaaa ai yakoona ma'as saajideen

textAr: قَالَ يَـٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
textEn: Allah said, “O Iblīs, what is the matter with you that you were not with those who prostrated?”
textTranslit: Qaala yaaa Ibleesu maa laka allaa takoona ma'as saajideen

textAr: قَالَ لَمْ أَكُن لِّأَسْجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن صَلْصَـٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
textEn: He said, “I am not such to prostrate before a human whom You created from sounding clay, made of aging mud.”
textTranslit: Qaala lam akul li asjuda libasharin khalaqtahoo min salsaalim min hama im masnoon

textAr: قَالَ فَٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌ
textEn: He said, “Then get out of here, for you are accursed,
textTranslit: Qaala fakhruj minhaa fa innaka rajeem

textAr: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ ٱللَّعْنَةَ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
textEn: and the curse will be upon you until the Day of Judgment.”
textTranslit: Wa inna 'alikal la'nata ilaa Yawmid Deen

textAr: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
textEn: Iblīs said, “My Lord, then grant me respite until the Day they are resurrected.”
textTranslit: Qaala Rabbi fa anzirneee ilaa Yawmi yub'asoon

textAr: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ
textEn: Allah said, “You are of those who are granted respite,
textTranslit: Qaala fa innaka minal munzareen

textAr: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْوَقْتِ ٱلْمَعْلُومِ
textEn: until the Day of the Appointed Time.”
textTranslit: Ilaa Yawmil waqtil ma'loom

textAr: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
textEn: He said, “My Lord, since You have sent me astray, I will surely make [sins] alluring to them on earth and mislead them all,
textTranslit: Qaala Rabbi bimaaa aghwaitanee la uzayyinaana lahum fil ardi wa la ughwiyan nahum ajma'een

textAr: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
textEn: except for Your chosen slaves among them.”
textTranslit: Illaa 'ibaadaka minhumul mukhlaseen

textAr: قَالَ هَـٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ عَلَىَّ مُسْتَقِيمٌ
textEn: Allah said, “This is a straight path leading to Me.
textTranslit: Qaala haaza Siraatun 'alaiya Mustaqeem

textAr: إِنَّ عِبَادِى لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَـٰنٌ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْغَاوِينَ
textEn: You will have no authority over My slaves, except the deviants who follow you.
textTranslit: Inna 'ibaadee laisa laka 'alaihim sultaanun illaa manittaba'aka minal ghaaween

textAr: وَإِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ لَمَوْعِدُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
textEn: And Hell is certainly the promised place for them, all together.
textTranslit: Wa inna jahannama lamaw'iduhum ajma'een

textAr: لَهَا سَبْعَةُ أَبْوَٰبٍ لِّكُلِّ بَابٍ مِّنْهُمْ جُزْءٌ مَّقْسُومٌ
textEn: It has seven gates; each gate will have its allotted share of them.”
textTranslit: Lahaa sab'atu abwaab; likulli baabim minhum juz'um maqsoom

textAr: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
textEn: The righteous will be in gardens and springs.
textTranslit: Innal muttaqeena fee Jannaatinw wa 'uyoon

textAr: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَـٰمٍ ءَامِنِينَ
textEn: “Enter in peace and safety!”
textTranslit: Udkhuloohaa bisalaamin aamineen

textAr: وَنَزَعْنَا مَا فِى صُدُورِهِم مِّنْ غِلٍّ إِخْوَٰنًا عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مُّتَقَـٰبِلِينَ
textEn: We will remove all ill feelings from their hearts; like brothers, seated on couches facing one another.
textTranslit: Wa naza'naa ma fee sudoorihim min ghillin ikhwaanan 'alaa sururim mutaqaabileen

textAr: لَا يَمَسُّهُمْ فِيهَا نَصَبٌ وَمَا هُم مِّنْهَا بِمُخْرَجِينَ
textEn: No fatigue will ever touch them therein, nor will they ever be made to leave.
textTranslit: Laa yamas suhum feehaa nasabunw wa maa hum minhaa bimukhrajeen

textAr: ۞ نَبِّئْ عِبَادِىٓ أَنِّىٓ أَنَا ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
textEn: Inform My slaves that I am indeed the All-Forgiving, the Most Merciful,
textTranslit: Nabbi' 'ibaadeee annneee anal Ghafoorur Raheem

textAr: وَأَنَّ عَذَابِى هُوَ ٱلْعَذَابُ ٱلْأَلِيمُ
textEn: and that My punishment is the most painful punishment.
textTranslit: Wa anna 'azaabee uwal 'azaabul aleem

textAr: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ عَن ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ
textEn: And inform them about the guests of Abraham.
textTranslit: Wa nabbi'hum 'an daifi Ibraaheem

textAr: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمًا قَالَ إِنَّا مِنكُمْ وَجِلُونَ
textEn: When they entered upon him and said, “Peace!” He said, “We are afraid of you.”
textTranslit: Iz dakhaloo 'alaihi faqaaloo salaaman qaala innaa minkum wajiloon

textAr: قَالُوا۟ لَا تَوْجَلْ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِيمٍ
textEn: They said, “Do not be afraid; We give you glad tidings of a knowledgeable boy.”
textTranslit: Qaaloo la tawjal innaa nubashshiruka bighulaamin 'aleem

textAr: قَالَ أَبَشَّرْتُمُونِى عَلَىٰٓ أَن مَّسَّنِىَ ٱلْكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُونَ
textEn: He said, “Do you give me glad tidings despite my old age? What glad tidings are you giving me?”
textTranslit: Qaala abashshartumoonee 'alaaa am massaniyal kibaru fabima tubashshiroon

textAr: قَالُوا۟ بَشَّرْنَـٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ فَلَا تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْقَـٰنِطِينَ
textEn: They said, “We have given you glad tidings in truth, so do not be of those who despair.”
textTranslit: Qaaloo bashsharnaaka bilhaqqi falaa takum minal qaaniteen

textAr: قَالَ وَمَن يَقْنَطُ مِن رَّحْمَةِ رَبِّهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ
textEn: He said, “Who would despair of his Lord’s mercy except those who are misguided?”
textTranslit: Qaala wa mai yaqnatu mir rahmati Rabbiheee illad daaaloon

textAr: قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
textEn: He said, “So, what is your mission, O messengers?”
textTranslit: Qaala famaa khatbukum aiyuhal mursaloon

textAr: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ
textEn: They said, “We have been sent to a wicked people,
textTranslit: Qaaloo innaaa ursilnaaa ilaa qawmim mujrimeen

textAr: إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ إِنَّا لَمُنَجُّوهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
textEn: except the household of Lot; we will surely save them all,
textTranslit: Illaaa Aala Loot; innaa lamunajjoohum ajma'een

textAr: إِلَّا ٱمْرَأَتَهُۥ قَدَّرْنَآ ۙ إِنَّهَا لَمِنَ ٱلْغَـٰبِرِينَ
textEn: except his wife; We have decreed that she will be among those who stay behind.”
textTranslit: Illam ra atahoo qaddarnaaa innahaa laminal ghaabireen

textAr: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
textEn: When the messengers came to the household of Lot,
textTranslit: Falamma jaaa'a Aala Lootinil mursaloon

textAr: قَالَ إِنَّكُمْ قَوْمٌ مُّنكَرُونَ
textEn: he said, “You are unfamiliar people.”
textTranslit: Qaala innakum qawmum munkaroon

textAr: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ جِئْنَـٰكَ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ فِيهِ يَمْتَرُونَ
textEn: They said, “We have come to you with that [punishment] which they have doubted.
textTranslit: Qaaloo bal ji'naaka bimaa kaanoo feehi yamtaroon

textAr: وَأَتَيْنَـٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَإِنَّا لَصَـٰدِقُونَ
textEn: We have come to you with the truth, and we are certainly truthful.
textTranslit: Wa atainaaka bilhaqqi wa innaa lasaadiqoon

textAr: فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍ مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱتَّبِعْ أَدْبَـٰرَهُمْ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنكُمْ أَحَدٌ وَٱمْضُوا۟ حَيْثُ تُؤْمَرُونَ
textEn: So travel with your household in the dark of night and go behind them; none of you should look back, and keep going to where you are commanded.”
textTranslit: Fa asri bi ahlika biqit'im minal laili wattabi' adbaarahum wa laa yaltafit minkum ahadunw wamdoo haisu tu'maroon

textAr: وَقَضَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْأَمْرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ مَقْطُوعٌ مُّصْبِحِينَ
textEn: We conveyed this decree to him that these [people] will be exterminated by early morning.”
textTranslit: Wa qadainaaa ilaihi zaalikal amra anna daabira haaa'ulaaa'i maqtoo'um musbiheen

textAr: وَجَآءَ أَهْلُ ٱلْمَدِينَةِ يَسْتَبْشِرُونَ
textEn: The people of the city came [to Lot] rejoicing.
textTranslit: Wa jaaa'a ahlul madeenati yastabshiroon

textAr: قَالَ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ ضَيْفِى فَلَا تَفْضَحُونِ
textEn: Lot said, “These are my guests, so do not bring shame on me.
textTranslit: Qaala inna haaa'ulaaa'i daifee falaa tafdahoon

textAr: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلَا تُخْزُونِ
textEn: Fear Allah and do not disgrace me.”
textTranslit: Wattaqul laaha wa laa tukhzoon

textAr: قَالُوٓا۟ أَوَلَمْ نَنْهَكَ عَنِ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
textEn: They said, “Did we not forbid you from [protecting] people?”
textTranslit: Qaalooo awalam nanhaka 'anil 'aalameen

textAr: قَالَ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ بَنَاتِىٓ إِن كُنتُمْ فَـٰعِلِينَ
textEn: He said, “These are my daughters [to marry], if you must.”
textTranslit: Qaala haaa'ulaaa'i banaateee in kuntum faa'ileen

textAr: لَعَمْرُكَ إِنَّهُمْ لَفِى سَكْرَتِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
textEn: By your life [O prophet], they were wandering blindly in their intoxication [of lust].
textTranslit: La'amruka innahum lafee sakratihim ya'mahoon

textAr: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ مُشْرِقِينَ
textEn: So they were seized by the blast at sunrise,
textTranslit: Fa akhazat humus saihatu mushriqeen

textAr: فَجَعَلْنَا عَـٰلِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
textEn: and We turned their cities upside down and rained down on them stones of baked clay.
textTranslit: Faja'alnaa 'aaliyahaa saafilahaa wa amtamaa 'alaihim hijaaratam min sjijjeel

textAr: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَـٰتٍ لِّلْمُتَوَسِّمِينَ
textEn: Indeed, there are signs in this for those who discern.
textTranslit: Inna fee zaalika la Aayaatil lilmutawassimeen

textAr: وَإِنَّهَا لَبِسَبِيلٍ مُّقِيمٍ
textEn: And their place is located by a known route.
textTranslit: Wa innahaa labi sabeelim muqeem

textAr: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً لِّلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
textEn: Indeed, there are signs in this for the believers.
textTranslit: Inna fee zaalika la Aayatal lilmu'mineen

textAr: وَإِن كَانَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْأَيْكَةِ لَظَـٰلِمِينَ
textEn: And the people of the Forest were wrongdoers.
textTranslit: Wa in kaana Ashaabul Aikati lazaalimeen

textAr: فَٱنتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ وَإِنَّهُمَا لَبِإِمَامٍ مُّبِينٍ
textEn: So We punished them in retribution, and both [places] are by a clear highway.
textTranslit: Fantaqamnaa minhum wa innahumaa labi imaamim mubeen

textAr: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْحِجْرِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
textEn: Surely the people of Al-Hijr also rejected the messengers.
textTranslit: Wa laqad kazzaba ashaabul Hijril mursaleen

textAr: وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُمْ ءَايَـٰتِنَا فَكَانُوا۟ عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
textEn: We gave them Our signs, but they kept turning away from them.
textTranslit: Wa aatainaahum Aayaatinaa fakaanoo 'anhaa mu'rideen

textAr: وَكَانُوا۟ يَنْحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا ءَامِنِينَ
textEn: They carved houses in the mountains, feeling secure.
textTranslit: Wa kaanoo yanhitoona minal jibaali buyootan aamineen

textAr: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ مُصْبِحِينَ
textEn: So they were seized by the blast early in the morning.
textTranslit: Fa akhazat humus saihatu musbiheen

textAr: فَمَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
textEn: Nothing of what they earned was of any avail to them.
textTranslit: Famaaa aghnaa 'anhum maa kaanoo yaksiboon

textAr: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ ۗ وَإِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ لَـَٔاتِيَةٌ ۖ فَٱصْفَحِ ٱلصَّفْحَ ٱلْجَمِيلَ
textEn: We have not created the heavens and earth and all that is between them except for a true purpose. The Hour is certainly coming, so bear with them graciously.
textTranslit: Wa maa khalaqnas samaawaati wal arda wa maa bainahumaaa illaa bilhaqq; wa innas Saa'ata la aatiyatun fasfahis safhal jameel

textAr: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ ٱلْخَلَّـٰقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
textEn: Indeed, your Lord is the Absolute Creator, the All-Knowing.
textTranslit: Inna Rabbaka Huwal khallaaqul 'aleem

textAr: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَـٰكَ سَبْعًا مِّنَ ٱلْمَثَانِى وَٱلْقُرْءَانَ ٱلْعَظِيمَ
textEn: We have surely given you the seven oft-repeated verses and the great Qur’an.
textTranslit: Wa laqad aatainaaka sab'am mnal masaanee wal Qur-aanal 'azeem

textAr: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجًا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
textEn: Do not look longingly at the pleasures We have given certain classes of them, nor grieve over them, but lower your wing [in humility] to the believers.
textTranslit: Laa tamuddanna 'ainaika ilaa maa matta 'naa biheee azwaajam minhum wa laa tahzan 'alaihim wakhfid janaahaka lilmu 'mineen

textAr: وَقُلْ إِنِّىٓ أَنَا ٱلنَّذِيرُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
textEn: And say, “I am indeed a clear warner.” –
textTranslit: Wa qul inneee anan nazeerul mubeen

textAr: كَمَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَى ٱلْمُقْتَسِمِينَ
textEn: just as We sent down [punishment] upon those who divided [their religion],
textTranslit: Kamaaa anzalnaa 'alal muqtasimeen

textAr: ٱلَّذِينَ جَعَلُوا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ عِضِينَ
textEn: those who split the Qur’an into different portions.
textTranslit: Allazeena ja'alul Quraana'ideen

textAr: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَسْـَٔلَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
textEn: By your Lord, We will surely question them all
textTranslit: Fawa Rabbika lanas'a lannahum ajma'een

textAr: عَمَّا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
textEn: concerning what they used to do.
textTranslit: 'Ammaa kaanoo ya'maloon

textAr: فَٱصْدَعْ بِمَا تُؤْمَرُ وَأَعْرِضْ عَنِ ٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ
textEn: Then proclaim what you are commanded, and turn away from those who associate partners with Allah.
textTranslit: Fasda' bimaa tu'maru wa a'rid anil mushrikeen

textAr: إِنَّا كَفَيْنَـٰكَ ٱلْمُسْتَهْزِءِينَ
textEn: We will surely suffice you against the mockers,
textTranslit: Innaa kafainaakal mustahzi'een

textAr: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۚ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
textEn: those who set up beside Allah another god; they will come to know.
textTranslit: Allazeena yaj'aloona ma'al laahi ilaahan aakhar; fasawfa ya'lamoon

textAr: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
textEn: We know that you are distressed by what they say.
textTranslit: Wa laqad na'lamu annak yadeequ sadruka bimaa yaqooloon

textAr: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
textEn: So glorify your Lord with praise and be among those who prostrate [to Him],
textTranslit: Fasbbih bihamdi Rabbika wa kum minas saajideen

textAr: وَٱعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِيَكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
textEn: and worship your Lord until the certainty [of death] comes to you.
textTranslit: Wa'bud Rabbaka hattaa yaatiyakal yaqeen
